assertions.name: marketplace ?kind= filter uses derived kind (covers stuck pre-fix upgrades)

evidence.evidence: derived kind = agents.kind OR seller_areas-implied workflow

assertions.name: dry-run dispatcher returns WorkflowRunResult shape with steps + outcome
PRD-X6 — /upgrade always flips agents.kind=workflow when areas are declared

evidence.invariant: declaring areas IS workflow intent — kind flips unconditionally

assertions.name: Regression — upgrade page must NOT hardcode the legacy placeholder

evidence.invariant: kind=workflow path is always reachable from upgrade UI

assertions.name: Discoverability — api-only listings surface the Upgrade-to-workflow link

evidence.invariant: sellers + buyers can find the upgrade path on api-only agents
